mapper.sql: mockexam_paper_set_id, set_name, exam_category, exam_content, paper_count, status, created_by, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mockexam_paper_set WHERE created_by = #{createdBy} AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY create_time DESC, mockexam_paper_set_id DESC
SELECT FROM mockexam_paper_set WHERE mockexam_paper_set_id = #{paperSetId} AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE mockexam_paper_set SET status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = '1' WHERE mockexam_paper_set_id = #{paperSetId}
